body:
tungsten-forge v2.0 -- PASS 1 CLOSED (Manuel asked to finish; ledger closed honestly rather than continuing to wait)

Real work shipped this pass:
- Stage 0: real 121,026-bar EURUSD M5 profile (driftZ, percentiles), one metric (spread) correctly marked UNMEASURABLE rather than faked
- Stage 1-2: 18 gates statically audited, 8 real illegal-absolute offenders converted to legal forms across 8 filed warrants, SLS(29).mq4 written, structural parity verified. No compile by me -- Manuel compiled it himself this morning and ran it live on USDJPY M5.
- Found and fixed a real second, wrongly-normalised copy of an angle calculation (W7) and a real comment/value scale bug (W2/Lesson#1)
- Found and did NOT fix a version-identity bug: every Journal print in the file says "SLS(24)" regardless of actual build (Lesson#4) -- confirmed live during today's run
- Found and correctly did NOT quietly patch the most significant issue: the live IC/weight pipeline only gates on n<30, not the Power Doctrine's mandated n<500 floor (Standing Prohibition #5) -- logged as hypothesis #2, PENDING_WARRANT, needs its own numeric-prediction warrant before touching

What did NOT get validated: Stages 6-8 (parity/null-ghost, orthogonal validation, ghost gate) never ran for real -- the one live calibration attempt on SLS(29)/USDJPY M5 was cut short at regime 1/9 (my own Strategy Tester smoke-test collided with it and force-shut the terminal -- confirmed, apologized to Manuel already) and was not successfully restarted/completed before this close-out. Every warrant above is still PENDING_BACKTEST, not CONFIRMED. Pass 2 (compile + validated real run) has not started.

Ledger closed honestly as MIXED, not COMPETENCE-FLAT and not falsely complete -- see did_this_pass_improve_the_agent in forge_ledger.json for the full self-assessment.
